MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Response To Interrogatory And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard M. Rogers, of Law Office of Richard M. Rogers, Tel. 415.981.9788, for plaintiffs;
Diane Pritchard, of Vogl Meredith Burke, LLP, Tel. 415.398.0200, ext 233, for defendants Episcopal Community Services, appearing via CourtCall;
Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR No. 8052, Tel. 925.360.6065.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The parties reach an agreement regarding PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY SWAN'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Interrogatory And For Sanctions. Defendant's counsel shall contact Ms. Blake to see if she will consent to providing her telephone number and place of business so that she can be contacted by plaintiffs' counsel. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Carol Haraburda, CSR No. 8052; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Response To Interrogatory And For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Rogers of Law Offices of Richard Rogers telephone number 415-981-9788 for Plaintiff.
Diane Pritchard of Vogel Meredith Burke, LLP telephone number 415-398-0200 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

Counsel for the Plaintiff did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY SWAN'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Interrogatory And For Sanctions is continued to July 17, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
